channel.title: Home on ftvkyo.me
channel.description: Recent content in Home on ftvkyo.me

item.title: Website tweaks
item.description: I have done some minor optimization of the website in order to improve its Lighthouse score and its performance. The score should be above 90% in every category (except PWA that I don’t target) at the moment of publishing this post. I only tested it on localhost, but as the most significant problem was caused by Google Fonts the website depends on, that part should be the same as in production.

item.title: Parentheses devlog #1: getting to LLVM IR emission
item.description: Table of contents Table of contents Pre-intro Intro The language What has been done already Current state Input 👉 Tokenized 👉 Parsed 👉 Verified 👉 Transformed 👉 IR Emitted 👉 Future updates Pre-intro I start these series hoping to continue them along with the development of the project this devlog is related to. Not only the project is an excercise for me, but the devlog itself is as well.

item.title: A New Website
item.description: Anybody here? I got this thought to make my website a very long time ago. A classic idea for a developer, right? However, I could never finish its creation. For a long time, I had some random pages dangling on my domain. I always wanted to put something interesting there, and as I never truly needed a website, I just played with different things abandoning them later. Only two attempts were notable.

item.title: About me
item.description: My name is Andrei Stepanenko (also known as ftvkyo or ftvkyo2011) and this is my personal website. My hobbies My main hobbies are software development, photography and origami. Is reading a hobby? You can find links to my Github, a Google album with a selection of my photos and my Goodreads profile in the links section. My work Well. Yes. Software development is not only my hobby, but also is my job.

item.title: Links
item.description: Github: ftvkyo. Gitlab: ftvkyo. Telegram channel: ftvkyo2011. Had been my central “node” for a long time until I released this website. Steam: ftvkyo2011. Photos: Google Album. A selection of my photos. Goodreads: Andrei Stepanenko. It’s not complete. Instagram: ftvkyo. Never seriously used.
